rejected_candidates.reason: The finite [0,-40] two-position attention mask is not equivalent to omitting the mask and setting is_causal=1; every known case changes class output.
Replacing the boolean CastLike anchor with Cast exposes the real 30x30 boolean carrier to the profiler: memory rises from 399 to 1298.
The historical lower-cost model fails the mandatory generator-domain gate.

non_candidate_findings.task8: Exact-hash lane_a5 audit already tested int32 anchor removal: known-correct but cost 431 to 454. No initializer-only exact substitution survives shape/cost checks.
non_candidate_findings.task25: sigV and negsigK are proportional, but their compensated reuse requires a negative Attention scale and produces NaNs. outscale cannot be folded only into the final Einsum because it is also an Attention operand.
non_candidate_findings.task62: Equal-valued scalar initializers have incompatible schema-required ranks; reuse needs an added shape carrier and is not cheaper.
non_candidate_findings.task250: Exact-hash lane_a4 and harvest evidence found best alternate known-correct cost 473 versus 468. The rank-full 4x4 absent/present code tables have no exact smaller shared factor.
non_candidate_findings.task275: MA differs from BA and MB differs from BB. Their common zero rows 16..29 cannot be trimmed without reconstructing the 30-output axis; joint family ranks are full and historical cost-317 polynomial models fail known gold.
non_candidate_findings.task308: Exact-hash lane_a4 audit confirms the incumbent already has the newer 4x4 index and reflect-pad reduction; no lower known-correct historical member exists.

fresh5000.reason: No new candidate passed both strict-cheaper and complete-known gates; the only historical cheaper known-pass task268 model already has a recorded 2219/5000 fresh rejection.
